overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing a character walking through an industrial urban neighborhood with auto parts stores, warehouses, and moderate vehicle traffic including taxis and a police car. The character navigates sidewalks and crosswalks under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with auto parts store

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an intersection

entered.detail: red industrial building with large white 'USED AUTO PARTS' painted signage
tall multi-story warehouse building with scaffolding and weathered facade
classic yellow taxi cab driving along the street
wooden utility pole with traffic signals and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a red industrial building marked 'USED AUTO PARTS'. The area features warehouse architecture with a tall weathered building ahead, sparse vegetation, and light traffic including a yellow taxi visible in the distance.

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto the marked crosswalk
black sedan drives through the intersection past the crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street alongside two other pedestrians while watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: man in gray striped sweater walking alongside ego across the street
black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
dark colored four-door sedan moving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk, joining two other pedestrians crossing the street. A black sedan drives past as they navigate the crossing, moving away from the auto parts building toward the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: city bus temporarily blocks the view of the street while walking alongside it

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a parked city bus and trash bags

notable_agents.action: city bus parked along the curb with advertising on its side

entered.detail: long city transit bus with green and white livery and side advertisements
low industrial building with cinder block and brick facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a parked city bus, the character moves past industrial brick warehouses. The bus temporarily occludes the view of the street as the character continues forward past trash bags piled near the curb.

events.description: character steps onto another crosswalk at a different intersection
LCPD police cruiser drives past the crosswalk with sirens

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and pausing briefly to let the police car pass

notable_agents.action: LCPD police cruiser with blue and white livery driving through the intersection
woman in white shirt walking on the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: white police car with blue 'LCPD' markings and emergency lights
multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels
metal chain link fencing along the sidewalk perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character enters another crosswalk near a concrete parking garage structure. An LCPD police cruiser drives past with emergency lights, causing the character to pause briefly while crossing. Chain link fencing lines the sidewalk near the intersection.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past parked cars

entered.detail: gray four-door sedan parked along the curb
elevated highway overpass visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the final stretch of sidewalk past parked vehicles including a gray sedan. The industrial area continues with chain link fencing on the right and an elevated highway overpass visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit industrial district, transitioning from a cluster of auto parts warehouses toward an elevated highway overpass. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a red used auto parts building and weathered warehouses, moving forward as a yellow taxi appears in the distance. As the character enters a wide intersection, the scene shifts to a crosswalk where they navigate past a black sedan and other pedestrians before continuing along a narrow path lined with brick warehouses and a parked city bus. The movement then leads into another crossing near a concrete parking garage, where the view is momentarily punctuated by a passing LCPD police cruiser with flashing lights. Finally, the camera follows the character past chain link fencing and parked gray sedans as the industrial landscape opens up toward a distant highway overpass.
